title: Ohm's Law Calculator - Voltage, Current, Resistance
description: Free Ohm's law calculator. Calculate voltage (V), current (I), or resistance (R) using V=IR. Also shows power consumption.
keywords: ohms law calculator, voltage current resistance, V=IR calculator, electrical calculator
intro: Calculate voltage, current, or resistance using Ohm's Law (V = I × R). Enter any two values to find the third, plus power.

faq.a: Ohm's Law states V = I × R, where V is voltage (volts), I is current (amps), and R is resistance (ohms). It describes the relationship between these three electrical quantities.

faq.q: How to calculate power from Ohm's Law?
faq.a: Power P = V × I = I²R = V²/R. Once you know any two of V, I, R, you can calculate power in watts.
